evaluator_identity.admissibility_rule: Semantics-preserving iff observable tuple is unchanged for all witnesses in S under the pinned environment; otherwise V3 or reject.

witness_set.description: Golden fixtures + drift-suite cases run in CI at closure time.

notes: Closure commit da7f9c30 is the first commit where all CI runs pass after the rustfmt fix.
Three consecutive passing runs span the final three semantic commits (§11.6 tighten, §11 add, rustfmt).
Certificate is a provenance record only. It introduces no new invariants.
Normative authority remains exclusively with src/verifier_v2.rs under the pinned environment.
